type: verify implementation + verify tests + verify simplicity/low complexity
title: Independently verify Rust broker server, config, cancellation, and addon boundaries

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Independent verification only. Verify endpoint behavior, config semantics, provider boundary, addon boundary, and test quality.
goals: Run the broker locally with mock provider if practical and hit /health and /v1/autocomplete.
Confirm provider switching is config-only and clients/protocol do not import provider-pi.
Confirm all provider outputs pass postprocessing before response.
Assess complexity and flag avoidable abstraction or missing deep-module boundaries.
non_goals: Do not rewrite architecture unless severe issues are found.
success_criteria: If verification fails, include concrete issues and revive MVP-030 or spawn a fix task.
If verification passes, mark broker/server/addon artifacts as trusted in the handoff.
